Bash(python3 -c "
from docx import Document
doc = Document\('docs/Data_Database_Architecture_v2.docx'\)
for p in doc.paragraphs:
    print\(p.text\)
" 2>/dev/null || echo "DOCX_FAIL")

Bash(python3 -c "
import zipfile, re
with zipfile.ZipFile\('docs/Product_Overview_User_Experience_v2.docx'\) as z:
    xml = z.read\('word/document.xml'\).decode\(\)
    text = re.sub\(r'<[^>]+>', '\\n', xml\)
    text = re.sub\(r'\\n+', '\\n', text\).strip\(\)
    print\(text[:15000]\)
")

  -H "apikey: $SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY" \\
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY" && echo "raw outputs attempted")

Bash(source /Users/samuel/Documents/MAIPA/.env && \\
curl -s "https://xrsyshxvrikfhwdsreqv.supabase.co/rest/v1/synthesis_raw_outputs?select=raw_llm_output&order=created_at.desc&limit=1" \\
  -H "apikey: $SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY" \\
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY" | python3 -c "
import json, sys
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
if data:
    raw = data[0].get\('raw_llm_output', {}\)
    recs = raw.get\('recommendations', []\)
    for r in recs:
        print\(f'{r.get\(\\"ticker\\"\)}: {r.get\(\\"action\\"\)} -> {r.get\(\\"targetAllocationPct\\"\)}%'\)
    if not recs:
        print\('No recommendations in LLM output'\)
        print\(json.dumps\(raw, indent=2\)[:500]\)
")
